# Requirements index

Spec-driven breakdown: **milestone → epic → story → task**. IDs follow [`STRUCTURE-PROPOSAL.md`](STRUCTURE-PROPOSAL.md).

| Artifact | Path |
|----------|------|
| Master roadmap (epics + %) | [`../ROADMAP.md`](../ROADMAP.md) |
| WBS (status to story) | [`WBS.csv`](WBS.csv) · [`WBS.md`](WBS.md) |
| SDLC blueprint (frozen) | [`../../blueprints/sdlc/README.md`](../../blueprints/sdlc/README.md) |
| Product functional | [`../product/INDEX.md`](../product/INDEX.md) |
| Traceability | [`traceability/`](traceability/) |
| Risks (RBS) | [`risks/`](risks/) |
